abstract: Comprehensive best practices guide for SolidJS and SolidStart applications, designed for AI agents and LLMs. Contains 100+ rules across 9 categories, prioritized by impact from critical (reactivity correctness, data fetching) to incremental (interop, testing). Each rule includes explanations, real-world incorrect vs. correct examples, and impact metrics to guide automated refactoring and code generation. Built from production experience migrating from React to SolidJS.
